gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090
gpus.summary: RTX 5090 is confirmed for DLSS 5 Neural Rendering (coming Fall 2026). Today it supports DLSS 4.5 with Dynamic 6X Multi Frame Generation and 2nd-gen Transformer Super Resolution.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080
gpus.summary: RTX 5080 is confirmed for DLSS 5 Neural Rendering (coming Fall 2026). Today it supports DLSS 4.5 with Dynamic 6X Multi Frame Generation.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti
gpus.summary: RTX 5070 Ti is confirmed for DLSS 5 Neural Rendering (coming Fall 2026). Today it supports DLSS 4.5 with Dynamic 6X Multi Frame Generation.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070
gpus.summary: RTX 5070 is confirmed for DLSS 5 Neural Rendering (coming Fall 2026). Today it supports DLSS 4.5 with Dynamic 6X Multi Frame Generation.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Ti
gpus.summary: RTX 5060 Ti supports DLSS 4.5 Dynamic 6X MFG today. DLSS 5 Neural Rendering is unconfirmed — VRAM constraints may limit support. Status will be updated when NVIDIA publishes official specs.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060
gpus.summary: RTX 5060 (8GB VRAM) supports DLSS 4.5 Dynamic 6X MFG today. DLSS 5 Neural Rendering is unlikely due to VRAM constraints — the GTC demo required a dedicated GPU with substantial memory.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090
gpus.summary: RTX 4090 DLSS 5 support is unconfirmed by NVIDIA. Partial support has been hinted but not guaranteed. Today it runs DLSS 4 with Frame Generation and Transformer Super Resolution.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 Super
gpus.summary: RTX 4080 Super DLSS 5 support is unconfirmed. Today it runs DLSS 4 with Frame Generation and Transformer Super Resolution.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti Super

gpus.summary: RTX 4070 Ti DLSS 5 support is unconfirmed. Today it runs DLSS 4 with Frame Generation.

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080 Ti
gpus.summary: GTX 1080 Ti does not support any version of DLSS. DLSS requires an NVIDIA RTX series GPU (RTX 20 or newer).

gpus.name: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080
gpus.summary: GTX 1080 does not support any version of DLSS. DLSS requires an NVIDIA RTX series GPU.

gpus.name: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX
gpus.summary: AMD GPUs do not support DLSS (NVIDIA exclusive). However, FSR 4 (FidelityFX Super Resolution 4) is AMD's alternative upscaling technology.

gpus.name: Intel Arc B580
gpus.summary: Intel GPUs do not support DLSS (NVIDIA exclusive). Intel XeSS is Intel's alternative upscaling technology.

feature_descriptions.dlss_super_resolution: DLSS Super Resolution -- 2nd-gen Transformer AI upscaling (DLSS 4/4.5)
feature_descriptions.dlaa: DLAA -- Deep Learning Anti-Aliasing for sharper image quality
feature_descriptions.ray_reconstruction: Ray Reconstruction -- AI-enhanced ray tracing quality (DLSS 3.5+)
feature_descriptions.frame_generation: Frame Generation -- Single AI-generated frame per rendered frame (DLSS 3, RTX 40)
feature_descriptions.multi_frame_generation_4x: Multi Frame Generation 4X -- 3 additional AI frames per rendered frame (DLSS 4, RTX 50)
feature_descriptions.dynamic_mfg_6x: Dynamic MFG 6X -- 5 additional AI frames per rendered frame (DLSS 4.5, RTX 50)
feature_descriptions.neural_rendering: Neural Rendering -- AI-powered photoreal lighting and materials (DLSS 5, coming Fall 2026)
